sentence: 我想特别感谢所有帮助过我的人。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng tèbié gǎnxiè suǒyǒu bāngzhù guò wǒ de rén.
english: I'd like to give special thanks to everyone who has helped me.

sentence: 比赛上半结束时比分是一比零。
pinyin: Bǐsài shàngbàn jiéshù shí bǐfēn shì yī bǐ líng.
english: The score was one to zero at the end of the first half.

meaning: to put into production; to put into operation
sentence: 新工厂预计明年初正式投产。
pinyin: Xīn gōng chǎng yù jì míng nián chū zhèng shì tóu chǎn.
english: The new factory is expected to officially go into production early next year.

sentence: 这本书的版式设计简洁又美观。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū de bǎn shì shè jì jiǎn jié yòu měi guān.
english: The layout design of this book is clean and attractive.

sentence: 这款应用的开发者每周都会更新版本。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yìng yòng de kāi fā zhě měi zhōu dōu huì gēng xīn bǎn běn.
english: The developer of this app releases updates every week.
